hero.subtext: CityEase brings all urban services together — transport, healthcare, utilities, government schemes, and more — in one friendly, accessible place.
hero.searchPlaceholder: Try: "How to apply for birth certificate" or "Pay electricity bill"…

services.heading: Everything You Need,
services.subtext: From paying bills to tracking buses — access every urban service without stepping out.

chatbot.heading: Meet Sakhi — Your City Guide
chatbot.subtext: Ask questions in English. Get instant, accurate guidance on any city service.
chatbot.greeting: Hello! I'm Sakhi, your personal City Guide. I can help you with any urban service. What do you need today?

emergency.heading: 🚨 Emergency Quick Access
emergency.subtext: One tap to reach critical services. Available 24/7.

dashboard.heading: Track Everything in Your
dashboard.subtext: Manage applications, bills, alerts, and service history in one view.

howItWorks.heading: How
howItWorks.subtext: Three simple steps from confusion to clarity. No middlemen. No queues.

steps.title: Search or Browse
steps.desc: Type your query in plain language or browse services by category.
steps.example: "How do I apply for a ration card?"

steps.title: Follow Step-by-Step Guide
steps.desc: Get clear instructions with required documents, costs, and timelines.
steps.example: Documents needed, time: 7 days, cost: Free

steps.title: Track & Complete
steps.desc: Apply online directly or know exactly where to go. Track your progress live.

location.heading: Services
location.subtext: Find hospitals, offices, transport, and centers near your location.
location.mapLabel: Interactive Map — Enable Location for Personalization

footer.tagline: Simplifying city life for every citizen.
